_comment: Reference hook configuration for the legacy / shell-only install path. Merge these entries into your ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key. Replace HOME_DIR with your actual home directory path. This file MIRRORS the canonical plugin manifest packages/kernel/hooks.json (which uses the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} placeholder instead of HOME_DIR); keep the two in sync when adding/removing hooks.

SessionStart.description: Reset fact-forcing gate tracker for clean session state
Reconcile the skill/command catalog at session start so stale entries are surfaced

UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect vague prompts and inject forcing instruction for prompt-enrichment skill

PreToolUse.description: GAP-G (v2.5.1): in headless mode, deny EnterPlanMode and redirect to TodoWrite so edits are not blocked on the unreachable approval dialog

H.7.23.1: blocks ExitPlanMode if active plan is HETS-routed AND missing ## Pre-Approval Verification section. Forces /verify-plan to run first (codifies drift-note 40 auto-triggering). Bypass via SKIP_VERIFY_PLAN=1 env var.

GAP-C fix (bench harness 2026-05-20): deterministically invokes route-decide.js before every sub-agent spawn, logs the verdict to ~/.claude/checkpoints/route-decide-log.jsonl. Closes the workflow.md route-decide rule's instruction-following gap (text rule was consistently bypassed in headless). Always approves; visibility is the goal, not blocking.
Surface the spawned persona's contract requirements before an Agent/Task spawn so the actor honors its functional checks
Fact-forcing gate: must Read a file before Edit/Write — prevents hallucinated edits
Block modifications to linter/formatter config files — fix code, not configs
H.9.11: detect duplicate top-level YAML keys at Edit/Write time; structural-before-semantic ordering (after config-guard).
H.4.2: Block writes containing secret-shaped literals (Anthropic/Stripe/Slack/GitHub/AWS keys, JWT, *_KEY/*_SECRET assignments). Hook-layer enforcement of the security.md pre-commit checklist.
H.4.2: Block Write of skill/pattern .md files that lack YAML frontmatter (silently-broken skills are worse than visibly-broken ones).
H.8.2: Surface active ADRs whose files_affected include the file being edited; emits [ADR-DRIFT-CHECK] forcing instruction (Class 1 advisory). Bypass via SKIP_ADR_CHECK=1 env var.
Validate KB / architecture doc structure (frontmatter + bidirectional related links) at Edit/Write time.
v2.9.0 FIX-I9: detect Bash redirects (>, >>, tee) targeting config-guard-protected files. WARN-not-BLOCK by default; STRICT_CONFIG_GUARD=1 env var escalates to block.

PostToolUse.description: Critique failed Bash commands and surface a corrective forcing instruction
ADVISORY (class 1) audit of Bash egress to hosts not declared in any persona's network_* trait. Audit, not prevention; real prevention is ContainerAdapter-tier.
Verify spawned actors cited KB sources; emit a forcing instruction when citations are missing.
v3.0 Phase 1: capture an L_spawn record envelope to ~/.claude/spawn-state/<run_id>/spawn-<id>.json on every Agent|Task spawn close. Fail-soft per ADR-0001.

v3.1 PR-3b spawn-close-resolver: OBSERVE-don't-allocate (OQ-21, ADR-0012). SHADOW-ONLY - resolve() runs with dry-run/read-only seams, journals the verdict, performs no git or spawn-state mutation. Fail-soft per ADR-0001.
Validate plan-file schema at Edit/Write time; emits [PLAN-SCHEMA-DRIFT] when a HETS-routed plan is missing required sections.
Reconcile the skill/command catalog after a write so new or moved entries are picked up.

PreCompact.description: Checkpoint context to file + instruct library session-snapshot save before compression

Stop.description: Warn about console.log statements in recently edited files
Auto-store [ENRICHED-PROMPT-START/END] blocks from response into prompt-patterns.json
After N responses, nudge user toward /self-improve (closes the session-end review loop)

Ghost Heartbeat W2-PR2 carrier (advisory drift-audit). Opt-in (GHOST_HEARTBEAT_EMIT=1), default-off; on an opted-in turn end hands the transcript to drift-audit.js as a DETACHED background process (debounced per session), then passes stdin through. Emits NO forcing instruction; placed BEFORE context-size-warn to keep that hook's last position.
GAP-F (v2.5.0): deterministic context-size warning, inserted LAST in the Stop chain so its forcing instruction is the final concatenation.
